rules: Once per turn, at any time during allied character's Activation, it may spend 2 POWER to use this Leadership Ability. Additionally, each Healthy non-Grunt allied character Contesting an objetive token counts as 2 Healthy characters when determining who is Securing the objective token.

rules: After an attack agains this character is resolved, it may use this superpower. If the attack is within RANGE 3, this character may make an attack against the attacker. This superpower can be used only once per turn.

superpowers.name: Symbiotic Instincts
rules: When this character is attacking, the defending character cannot modify their defense dice.

attacks.name: Triage
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains 1 POWER.

special_rules: WILD Stun: After each attack is resolved, the defender gains the Stun special condition.

rules: This character immediately makes a Shake action.

This superpower can be used only once per Turn.

rules: When this character would suffer WOUND from an enemy effect, reduce the amount of WOUND suffered by 1, to a minimum of 1.

Boom!: Before WOUND is dealt, each other character within RANGE 2 of the target character suffers 1 WOUND.
Horrify: After this attack is resolved, the target character gaisn the Root special condition.
Silver Bullet: WOUND caused by this attack cannot be reduced or prevented by superpowers or Team Tactic Cards.

superpowers.name: Reabsorb
rules: Choose an allied Sand Construct within RANGE 3 of this character. Place this character within RANGE 1 of the chosen Sand Construct. Then the chosen Sand Construct is KO'd and this character removes 1 WOUND from itself.

superpowers.name: Create Sand Construct
rules: You may have 2 Sand Constructs in your Squad instead of the normal 1. You must activate all allied Sand Constructs before this character's Activation.

At the start of this character's Activation, if there are fewer than 2 Sand Constructs in play, this character may suffer 2 WOUND. If it does, place 1 Sand Construct into play within RANGE 2 of this character. It gains and Activated token and is part of your Squad.

rules: Once per Turn, after an attack made by an allied character is resolved, if that attack dealt WOUND or if the target character has a THREAT of 5 or more, the attacking character may use this Leadership ability. If they do, the target character gains the Hex special condition.

special_rules: After this attack is resolved, the target character gains the Stagger special condition.

rules: This character or an allied character within RANGE 3 of this character removes up to 3 WOUND. This superpower can be used only once per Turn.

rules: When this character or an allied character within RANGE 3 is targeted by an attack or would make a dodge roll, this character may use this superpower. This character adds 2 dice to the defense or dodge roll.

rules: This character can modify and reroll FAILS results. When this character is attacking, defending, or dodging, it may reroll all of its dice.

special_rules: After the attack is resolved, the target character drops all objective tokens they are holding.

superpowers.name: Web Swing
rules: Place this character within RANGE 3 of its current position. The next time it makes a Webline Kick attack this turn, add two dice to that attack roll. This superpower can be used only once per turn.

superpowers.name: Hypnotic Stare
rules: Choose an enemy character within RANGE 3. Advance the chosen character SHORT. This superpower can be used only once per Turn.

superpowers.name: Eternal Hunger
rules: After an attack against this character is resolved, it may use this superpower. If the attacker is withint RANGE 3, this character may make an attack against the attacker. This superpower can be used only once per Turn.

superpowers.name: Shapeshifting
rules: When this character begins a move action during its Activation, it may use this superpower. If it does, choose one of the following affects to the resolved before moving:
Bat: This character gains the Flight superpower during this move action.
Wolf: Increase this character's Speed to LARGE during this move action.
Mist: Drop all objective tokens and remove all special conditions and up to two WOUND from this character.

superpowers.name: Unholy Vampiric Immortality
rules: At the end of this character's Activation, it gains 1 POWER and removes 1 WOUND from itself for each other character within RANGE 3 of it that has the Bleed special condition.
